caveats: Synthetic advisor/family policy profile for local demo readiness.
equal_weight_theme_policy_note: This policy profile does not use equal-weight AI Adoption theme buckets.

manager_sleeve_target_allocation.advisor_notes: High-upside sleeve; drift should be reviewed in context of volatility and realized performance.
manager_sleeve_target_allocation.client_safe_description: Growth engine for AI infrastructure and related public equity exposure.

manager_sleeve_target_allocation.advisor_notes: Anchor public-equity growth sleeve with normal rebalance bands.
manager_sleeve_target_allocation.client_safe_description: Core public equity allocation intended to compound through higher-quality businesses.

manager_sleeve_target_allocation.advisor_notes: Review underweights before assigning cause; flows may explain drift.
manager_sleeve_target_allocation.client_safe_description: Income-oriented allocation intended to support cash generation and capital preservation.
manager_sleeve_target_allocation.display_name: Manager C - Income and Cash Generation

manager_sleeve_target_allocation.advisor_notes: Valuation marks can move slowly; drift should not be overread.
manager_sleeve_target_allocation.client_safe_description: Private markets and real-asset allocation for diversification and inflation sensitivity.
manager_sleeve_target_allocation.display_name: Manager D - Private Markets / Real Assets

manager_sleeve_target_allocation.advisor_notes: Useful quick-start baseline for cash and defensive allocation review.
manager_sleeve_target_allocation.client_safe_description: Liquidity reserve and defensive ballast for near-term flexibility.
manager_sleeve_target_allocation.display_name: Manager E - Liquidity Reserve / Defensive Ballast

manager_sleeve_target_allocation.advisor_notes: Small sleeve; evaluate in context of approved optionality budget.
manager_sleeve_target_allocation.client_safe_description: Opportunistic macro allocation intended to add convexity and tactical breadth.

policy_bucket_target_allocation.risk_budget_note: Lower volatility role; review if materially below target.
policy_bucket_target_allocation.role_description: Support cash generation and preserve capital through income-oriented exposures.

policy_bucket_target_allocation.risk_budget_note: Moderate equity risk budget with normal rebalance flexibility.
policy_bucket_target_allocation.role_description: Maintain a durable core public equity growth allocation.

policy_bucket_target_allocation.risk_budget_note: Valuation cadence can create apparent drift that needs review.
policy_bucket_target_allocation.role_description: Diversify the portfolio through private market and real-asset exposures.

policy_bucket_target_allocation.risk_budget_note: Tighter tolerance because this bucket supports flexibility.
policy_bucket_target_allocation.role_description: Keep near-term liquidity and defensive ballast explicit.

policy_bucket_target_allocation.risk_budget_note: Upside can create drift; review before interpreting as an error.
policy_bucket_target_allocation.role_description: Limit high-upside thematic and opportunistic exposure to an agreed sleeve.
